name: Buttons and Bow Knots
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Half and half or milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Mix together the first six ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Gently shape the dough into a ball on lightly floured surface.
4. Knead the dough five times.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Cut with a floured doughnut cutter.
7. To make bow knots, hold opposite sides of each doughnut ring and twist to form a figure 8.
8. Place holes (buttons) and bow knots on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
10. Immediately dip each button and bow knot into melted butter, then into sugar, coating all sides.
11. Serve warm. Makes 8 buttons and bow knots or 8 doughnuts.
